Actions.Text: REFERRED TO INVESTIGATIONS AND GOVERNMENT OPERATIONS
AMEND AND RECOMMIT TO INVESTIGATIONS AND GOVERNMENT OPERATIONS

Title: Extends the authority of the city of Poughkeepsie to impose a hotel and motel tax for an additional 3 years
Summary: Extends the authority of the city of Poughkeepsie to impose a hotel and motel tax for an additional three years.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend chapter 294 of the laws of 2023 amending the tax law relating to authorizing the city of Poughkeepsie to impose a hotel and motel tax, in relation to the effectiveness thereof
